To: London / Bangalore / Toronto team
From: PC
Subject: Let's get aligned

Hi all,

A few things have been a bit tangled this week, so I think the best thing is to get everyone on a call to sort it all out together.

Can we find a 30-minute slot where everyone can make it? I'll send a poll. On the call we can:
- Decide A vs B for the token binding
- Clear up the IdP / MFA confusion
- Catch up generally

Once we've talked it through I'll have a clearer picture and can update the plan. I think a good old-fashioned conversation will cut through the back-and-forth.

Let me know your availability and I'll lock something in for the soonest time that works for all three locations.

Thanks!

PC
